nasb.text: So he said to them, “Out of the eater came something to eat, And out of the strong came something sweet.” But they could not tell the riddle in three days.

esv.text: And he said to them, “Out of the eater came something to eat. Out of the strong came something sweet.” And in three days they could not solve the riddle.

cnv.text: 參孫對他們說： “可吃的從吃者出來； 甜的從強者出來。” 他們過了三日都不能說出謎語的意思。

ccb.text: 参孙说： “食物出自食者， 甜物出自强者。” 三天过后，他们仍然猜不出来。
